sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 퀄컴 회계 1분기 사상 최대 매출 123억 달러, 비GAAP EPS 3.50달러

keyPoints.text: FY26 1분기 매출이 사상 최대인 123억 달러를 기록했고, 전사와 QCT 매출이 모두 분기 최대를 경신했다.
자동차 매출이 두 분기 연속 10억 달러를 넘으며 분기 최대를 기록했고, 알파웨이브 세미 인수를 완료해 데이터센터 확장을 가속했다.

riskChanges.text: 회사는 단기 핸드셋 전망이 업계 전반의 메모리 공급 제약 영향을 받고 있다고 밝혔다.

businessChanges.text: CES 신제품과 고객 확보로 피지컬 AI 사업이 성장하고 있으며, 알파웨이브 세미 인수로 데이터센터 진출을 가속하고 있다.
회사는 프리미엄·하이티어 스마트폰 수요에 힘입어 FY2029 매출 목표 달성 경로를 유지하고 있다고 밝혔다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출 123억 달러, GAAP 주당순이익 2.78달러, 비GAAP 주당순이익 3.50달러를 기록했다.
QCT 핸드셋 매출은 78억 2,400만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 3% 늘었다.
분기 중 자사주 매입으로 26억 달러, 현금배당으로 9억 4,900만 달러(주당 0.89달러)를 집행했다.

watchItems.text: 2분기 가이던스에 반영된 메모리 공급 제약이 핸드셋 수요에 미치는 영향을 지켜볼 필요가 있다.
데이터센터·피지컬 AI로의 사업 다각화 성과를 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 qcom122825erex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Qualcomm Contact: Mauricio Lopez-Hodoyan Vice President, Investor Relations Phone: 1-858-658-4813 | e-mail: ir@qualcomm.com Qualcomm Announces First Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results Record Revenues: $12.3 billion GAAP EPS: $2.78, Non-GAAP EPS: $3.50 —Record Quarterly Total Company and QCT Revenues— —Record QCT Automotive Revenues: 2nd Consecutive Quarter of Greater Than $1 Billion— —Completed Acquisition of Alphawave Semi Accelerating Our Expansion into Data Centers— SAN DIEGO - February 4, 2026 - Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) today announced results for its fiscal first quarter ended December 28, 2025. “We are pleased to deliver strong quarterly results, with record total company revenues,” said Cristiano Amon, President and CEO of Qualcomm Incorporated. “Our momentum a  Normalized numeric aliases: $12.3 billion = 123억 달러; $1 Billion = 10억 달러; $12.3 = 12.3달러; $2.78 = 2.78달러; $3.50 = 3.50달러; $1 = 1달러.

ysical AI is growing, as evidenced by recent product announcements at CES and customer traction. While our near-term handsets outlook is impacted by industry-wide memory supply constraints, we are encouraged by end-consumer demand for premium and high tier smartphones, and remain on track to achieve our fiscal 2029 revenue goals.” First Quarter Results 1 GAAP Non-GAAP (in millions, except per share data and percentages) Q1 Fiscal 2026 Q1 Fiscal 2025 Change Q1 Fiscal 2026 Q1 Fiscal 2025 Change Revenues $12,252 $11,669 +5% $12,252 $11,669 +5% Earnings before taxes (EBT) $3,547 $3,635 (2%) $4  Normalized numeric aliases: $3,547 = 3,547달러; $3,635 = 3,635달러; $4,372 = 4,372달러; $4,427 = 4,427달러; $3,004 = 3,004달러; $3,180 = 3,180달러; $3,781 = 3,781달러; $3,830 = 3,830달러; $2.83 = 2.83달러; 3,547 million = 35억 4,700만 달러; 3,180 million = 31억 8,000만 달러; 4,372 million = 43억 7,200만 달러; 4,427 million = 44억 2,700만 달러; 3,004 million = 30억 400만 달러; 3,781 million = 37억 8,100만 달러; 3,830 million = 38억 3,000만 달러.

stockholders, including $949 million, or $0.89 per share, of cash dividends paid and $2.6 billion through repurchases of 15 million shares of common stock. Business Outlook The following statements are forward looking, and actual results may differ materially. The “Note Regarding Forward-Looking Statements” in this news release provides a description of certain risks that we face, and our most recent quarterly report on file with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) provides a more complete description of our risks. Our guidance for the second quarter of fiscal 2026 includes the estimated impact of memory supply constraints and related pricing on demand from several handset customers. The following table summarizes GAAP and Non-GAAP guidance based on the current outlook.
